title: Naming Usage
description: (system, workout) -> what that system calls it. Naming is a join, not a field: putting name='tempo run' on a workout row makes the dataset wrong on arrival, because Daniels' tempo is threshold and Hansons' tempo is marathon pace.

system.description: A system id, or null for folk usage belonging to no system.

calls_it.description: The colloquial name as used. This is the only place a colloquial name may live.

collides.description: true = this name maps to a different workout in another system. Derivable from the table, stored so the renderer can flag without a scan.
